title: Comparing Your Real Options for Alternatives to Gumroad's Payout Delays for Digital Creators
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: Are you a digital creator in a restricted country, stuck waiting for payments on Gumroad? You're not alone. In Nigeria, Ghana, Pakistan, and many other countries, PayPal, Stripe, and Gumroad block creators from selling digital products. The result: delayed payments, lost income, and frustration. Today, we'll explore your alternatives and help you sell digital products without the hassle of payout delays.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal, Stripe, and Gumroad offer payment processing for digital creators, but they restrict access to creators in certain countries. What do they actually offer? In reality, they provide a one-size-fits-all solution that fails to adapt to the unique needs of creators in restricted countries. Each platform has its own set of rules, fees, and requirements that can stifle innovation and creativity. Furthermore, their lack of flexibility means that creators are forced to conform to their standards, rather than being able to tailor their own store infrastructure to their needs. Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle offers a more flexible and adaptive solution, allowing creators to build a store that meets their specific needs and requirements.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

PayPal, Stripe, and Gumroad have strict policies in place to restrict access to creators in certain countries. But what does this really mean for creators who want to sell digital products? Essentially, it means that these platforms have predetermined rules and restrictions that creators must adhere to, or else risk being blocked or penalized. In contrast, Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle offers a more inclusive and adaptable solution, allowing creators to build a store that can reach a global audience, regardless of their location or the restrictions they may face.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment processing, speed, fees, and real costs are crucial factors to consider. What do PayPal, Stripe, and Gumroad really offer in terms of payment speed, fees, and real costs? The answer is that they often come with hidden fees, delayed payments, and a lack of transparency. In contrast, Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle offers a flat fee, instant automated delivery, and complete transparency, ensuring that creators can focus on what matters most – creating and selling their digital products.
Payout delays can be a major obstacle for digital creators in restricted countries.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

PayPal, Stripe, and Gumroad have limited automation and delivery capabilities, which can lead to frustration and delays for creators. What do they really offer in terms of automation and delivery? The truth is that they often rely on manual processes and outdated technology, leading to errors, inconsistencies, and missed opportunities. Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle offers advanced automation and delivery capabilities, ensuring that creators can focus on building their business, rather than wrestling with outdated technology.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

So, which option is right for you? If you're a digital creator in a restricted country, struggling with payout delays and limited access to payment processing, then Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle is the clear choice. Our solution offers a flexible, adaptive, and inclusive approach to payment processing, automation, and delivery, ensuring that creators can focus on what matters most – building their business and creating value for their customers.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
